---
title: "Home"
---

# 👋 Welcome

## Deniz Asmaz

**Industrial Engineering Student**\
Hacettepe University

This website contains my coursework and analytics assignments for the **EMU430 course**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### About this site

On this website you can find:

-   📊 Data analysis assignments
-   📈 R visualizations
-   🧪 Course projects

Use the navigation bar above to explore my coursework.
